site.title: Ovellum demo
site.description: A small static site built with `ovellum build` in manual mode.

hero.title: Markdown docs that don't drift
hero.subtitle: Ovellum builds a deployable static site from a folder of Markdown files. Pretty URLs, themes, syntax-highlighted code, no proprietary formats.

features.title: Fast by default
features.description: Sub-second builds for small sites. Shiki highlights at build time, so the browser ships zero runtime JS for code blocks.

features.title: Markdown-first
features.description: Write in plain `.md`. No proprietary format, no MDX required, no lock-in. Add static assets next to your content and they pass through verbatim.

features.title: Light + dark, no flash
features.description: Themes ship in OKLCH. Auto follows the OS; users can override per session and the preference is applied before first paint.

features.title: Sidebar + ToC included
features.description: Auto-generated nav from your file tree (with optional `_meta.json` ordering) plus a right-side outline of every page's h2/h3 headings.
